doc_html:
CHAPTER 14-E. ADOPTION AWARENESS ACT

§1445.1. Short title

            This Chapter may be cited as the "Adoption Awareness Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 14-E.  ADOPTION AWARENESS ACT
§1445.1.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the "Adoption Awareness Act".
Acts 2024, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2025.
